roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING FILED AT INSISTENCE
DEFT'S MOT TO CONTINUE (PRELIM HRG) FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MO PC 1385: VICTIM UNAVAILABLE/X:COURT CONDUCTSIN-CAMERA REVIEW OF SUBPOENAED RECORDS (#4 THROUGH #15), AND ORDERS THE RECORDS NOT BE RELEASED UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT,/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING AND 4011,6PC REPORT/CONT/DOP/LD:04-14-15/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:03-09-15/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:DA WITHDRAWS THE COMPLAINT FILED ON 02-11-15 & FILES ANEW COMPLAINT TODAY/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:04-14-15/X:BAIL REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET/X:CRT ORDS DEFTEXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:03-02-15/SA1:SAMANTHA F,/SAORD//CONTD:RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT/DOP/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/X:DEFT MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED,/TE: 4 HOURS/VD:07-29-15/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PC 4011,6 REPORT & STATUS/X:COURT RECEIVES PC 4011,6 REPORT FROM JPS,/CGTW/TE:3 HOURS/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
